title: Satu Kursi Kosong
theme: Menjelajahi keindahan sebuah koneksi tak terduga yang tumbuh dari observasi diam dan harapan tersembunyi di tengah rutinitas harian.

cover.prompt: A vintage city bus, with faded blue seats visible through its windows, idles at a bus stop bathed in late afternoon golden light. A cozy cafe stands across the pathway, its exterior warmed by the soft glow. The scene captures a sense of established routine and quiet comfort, subtly infused with an atmosphere of gentle intrigue. Environmental composition, focus on the bus and its surroundings, no detailed faces or close-up human features.
cover.style: Lo-fi aesthetic, vintage film grain, nostalgic feel

meta.plan_summary: A freelance worker routinely observes a silent passenger on a city bus, developing an unspoken connection through quiet observation, culminating in a brief, heartwarming interaction.
meta.target_emotion: warmth, gentle longing, quiet appreciation, melancholy
